name: Apex Gear-Predator
oracle_text:
Alt-Mode (Siege Mode) — {1}: Until your next turn, ~'s base power and toughness become 6/5 and it gains trample. Activate only as a sorcery.
Whenever ~ attacks, energize.
flavor_text: Even in its most efficient form, the hunger for Energon is as primal as any organic predator's.
design_notes: This card is designed to fit the RG 'Primal Dominance' archetype while adhering to the single-color Green constraint. It provides a high-power threat that can scale up into a massive combatant via Alt-Mode, fulfilling the TDFC (Tactical/Fighting/Combat) intent. By including the Energize keyword action on an attack trigger, it supports the 'Energon ramp' theme and creates synergy with UR or UG decks, while remaining a powerhouse for mono-green or RG players looking to overwhelm defenders.
